records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're strong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're strong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're strong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But something doesn't feel right. It's as if you're biding your time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But something doesn't feel right. It's as if you're biding your time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But something doesn't feel right. It's as if you're biding your time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you only blocking our attacks?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you only blocking our attacks?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you only blocking our attacks?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have quite a keen eye.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have quite a keen eye.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have quite a keen eye.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ship of the Elysium Shadows, Chorus, was designed to amplify the Orchestra's performance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ship of the Elysium Shadows, Chorus, was designed to amplify the Orchestra's performance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ship of the Elysium Shadows, Chorus, was designed to amplify the Orchestra's performance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And just before you arrived, I finished the preparations for the performance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And just before you arrived, I finished the preparations for the performance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And just before you arrived, I finished the preparations for the performance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Performance?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Performance?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Performance?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds are waves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds are waves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds are waves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The clang of metal against metal, the roar of the boost hammer, the explosion right after sparks fly...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The clang of metal against metal, the roar of the boost hammer, the explosion right after sparks fly...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The clang of metal against metal, the roar of the boost hammer, the explosion right after sparks fly...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And your screams and maniacal laughter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And your screams and maniacal laughter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And your screams and maniacal laughter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All waves played here will get mixed with the residual Corruption rays and spread outward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All waves played here will get mixed with the residual Corruption rays and spread outward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All waves played here will get mixed with the residual Corruption rays and spread outward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've activated Chorus' wave amplifier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've activated Chorus' wave amplifier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've activated Chorus' wave amplifier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what meaning does that have? Can't only those Shadows use it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what meaning does that have? Can't only those Shadows use it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what meaning does that have? Can't only those Shadows use it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, to someone who is about to get off the stage, perhaps it is meaningless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, to someone who is about to get off the stage, perhaps it is meaningless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, to someone who is about to get off the stage, perhaps it is meaningless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To me, the final act has significant meaning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To me, the final act has significant meaning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To me, the final act has significant meaning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A blackout?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A blackout?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A blackout?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ship's power has been completely cut off. But I checked myself that the converter is still working.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ship's power has been completely cut off. But I checked myself that the converter is still working.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ship's power has been completely cut off. But I checked myself that the converter is still working.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, your Chorus ends here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, your Chorus ends here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, your Chorus ends here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, please leave the stage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, please leave the stage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, please leave the stage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Just as I thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Just as I thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Just as I thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew she'd show up if I used Elysium's residual Corruption rays remaining on Chorus as bait.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew she'd show up if I used Elysium's residual Corruption rays remaining on Chorus as bait.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew she'd show up if I used Elysium's residual Corruption rays remaining on Chorus as bait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything according to the script.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Finally, our lead actress has arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Finally, our lead actress has arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Finally, our lead actress has arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Mors.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Mors.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Mors.
